milestones.title: Refactoring & Polish
milestones.vision: Improve the code quality, state management, and user interface of WordPal to ensure a robust, maintainable, and highly polished application foundation.
success_criteria: A test suite is established covering core app logic.
State management (Providers) is clean and predictable.
The UI across all 5 main screens is polished and responsive.

key_risks.risk: Breaking existing functionality during state management refactoring.
key_risks.whyItMatters: WordPal relies heavily on local state for the Notebook and Quiz features. Breakages here degrade the core user experience.

proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: We will establish a baseline test suite that guarantees core logic (like saving words and fetching definitions) remains intact.

milestones.verification_contract: No external API contracts are modified; Dictionary API consumption remains the same.
milestones.verification_integration: Verify that SQLite and SharedPreferences interactions still work smoothly with the refactored providers.
milestones.verification_operational: Run the app in debug mode to ensure there are no memory leaks or jank during screen transitions.
milestones.verification_uat: Manual walkthrough of the entire app: search a word, save it, view flashcards, take a quiz, and check the profile.
definition_of_done: Unit tests for core logic are implemented and passing.
UI transitions and states are visually verified to be smooth and consistent.
milestones.requirement_coverage: Focuses on improving maintainability and ensuring a high-quality user experience.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
# Boundary Map
- `lib/screens/`: UI Polish and layout refinements.
- `lib/providers/`: State management cleanups.
- `test/`: New test suite for regression prevention.

milestones.title: Audio Reading / Voice Search
milestones.vision: Enhance the WordPal search experience by allowing users to speak the word they want to look up, making it faster and more accessible.
success_criteria: Users can search for words using their voice.
The app handles microphone permissions correctly on both iOS and Android.

key_risks.whyItMatters: If the engine fails to recognize English words correctly, the search experience will be frustrating.
Handling microphone permissions incorrectly can cause the app to crash or be rejected from stores.

proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: A basic speech-to-text implementation works and outputs English words to the console.

milestones.verification_contract: Verify on both Android and iOS that tapping the mic button prompts for permission, listens to speech, and performs a search.
milestones.verification_integration: Ensure the speech-to-text plugin integrates correctly with the existing Search Screen state.
milestones.verification_operational: Monitor error rates for speech recognition initialization.
milestones.verification_uat: User should be able to say "hello" and see the word "hello" searched in the app.
definition_of_done: Speech-to-text successfully fills the search field with the spoken word.
UI clearly indicates when the device is listening.
milestones.requirement_coverage: Fulfills the new requirement for audio capture/reading in the app.
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
# Boundary Map

- **Search Screen**: Add a microphone button next to the search field for voice input.
- **Audio Service**: Implement a service to capture audio and convert it to text using device speech recognition.
- **Permissions**: Request microphone access on both Android and iOS.

# S01: Testing Foundation

**Established a baseline testing suite covering state management and core models.**

## What Happened

Initialized the testing environment by adding `mockito` and `build_runner`. Refactored `AppProvider` to support constructor dependency injection. Generated mock services and wrote a comprehensive test suite for `AppProvider` to verify state initialization, searches, and error handling. Finally, implemented model tests for `WordEntry` and `SavedWord` to ensure robust JSON serialization. All 9 tests are currently passing.

## Verification

Ran `flutter test` at the project root which successfully executed all tests in the `test/` directory.

## Requirements Advanced

None.

## Requirements Validated

None.

## New Requirements Surfaced

None.

## Requirements Invalidated or Re-scoped

None.

## Deviations

Refactored `AppProvider` to accept services via constructor rather than creating them internally, to allow for proper dependency injection and testing.

## Known Limitations

None.

## Follow-ups

None.

## Files Created/Modified

- `pubspec.yaml` — Added test dependencies
- `lib/providers/app_provider.dart` — Refactored for dependency injection
slices.full_uat_md:

**Verification Steps:**
1. Clone the project.
2. Run `flutter test`.
3. Verify that 9/9 tests pass with no errors.
slices.goal: Establish a baseline testing foundation to catch regressions before any major refactoring begins.

# S02: State Management & UI Polish

**Refactored state management and polished UI screens with smoother animations.**

## What Happened

Refactored `AppProvider` to eliminate redundant UI rebuilds by checking for actual state changes before calling `notifyListeners()`. Polished `WordDetailScreen` by adding `Hero` tags to the word text and using `AnimatedSwitcher` for the save button, ensuring smoother visual feedback. Enhanced `NotebookScreen` by replacing static container chips with `AnimatedContainer` for the status filters. Finally, successfully built the application and verified that all unit tests continue to pass without issues.

## Verification

Ran `flutter build apk --debug` and `flutter test`, both of which succeeded.

## Requirements Advanced

None.

## Requirements Validated

None.

## New Requirements Surfaced

None.

## Requirements Invalidated or Re-scoped

None.

## Deviations

None.

## Known Limitations

None.

## Follow-ups

None.

## Files Created/Modified

- `lib/providers/app_provider.dart` — Optimized `notifyListeners` for preference updates.
- `lib/screens/word_detail_screen.dart` — Added Hero animation and AnimatedSwitcher for the save button.
- `lib/screens/notebook_screen.dart` — Added AnimatedContainer for filter chips to smooth state transitions.
slices.full_uat_md:
# S02: State Management & UI Polish — UAT

**Milestone:** M001
**Written:** 2026-05-02T23:13:54.314Z

# UAT for S02: State Management & UI Polish

**Verification Steps:**
1. Open the app and search for a word.
2. On `WordDetailScreen`, tap the "Save to notebook" button and observe the smooth cross-fade animation as the icon changes to a checkmark.
3. Navigate to `NotebookScreen` and tap the "Learning", "Mastered", and "All" filter chips. Observe the smooth background color transition.
4. Verify the app compiles correctly by running `flutter build apk --debug`.
5. Run the test suite using `flutter test` and confirm all 9 tests pass.
slices.goal: Refactor the state management and polish UI components across the main screens.
slices.success_criteria: UI code is cleaner, provider usage is standardized, and visual glitches are resolved.
slices.integration_closure: App compiles successfully and all screens are accessible.

# S01: Speech-to-Text Search

**Implemented speech-to-text functionality for searching words.**

## What Happened

Successfully integrated the speech_to_text and permission_handler packages. Configured the required Android permissions and added a microphone button to the search field that listens for user voice input and populates the search bar.

## Verification

flutter analyze completed without any search_screen.dart errors.

- R001 — Added ability to capture audio for word searching.

- `android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` — Added RECORD_AUDIO permission

# T02: Implemented speech-to-text voice search logic in search screen.

**Implemented speech-to-text voice search logic in search screen.**

## What Happened

Refactored _SearchField into a StatefulWidget. Added a microphone button and integrated SpeechToText and Permission.microphone to allow voice search.

## Verification

flutter analyze passed without issues on search_screen.dart.

## Verification Evidence

| # | Command | Exit Code | Verdict | Duration |
|---|---------|-----------|---------|----------|
| 1 | `flutter analyze lib/screens/search_screen.dart` | 0 | ✅ pass | 4600ms |

## Deviations

Changed _SearchField to StatefulWidget instead of managing state in parent to encapsulate speech logic.

## Known Issues

None.

## Files Created/Modified

- `lib/screens/search_screen.dart`
tasks.description: Update `search_screen.dart` with a new mic icon button that requests microphone permissions and captures audio input to populate the text field.
tasks.observability_impact: Log when the microphone starts listening or fails.
